context: Tests whether the answer preserves the PencilKit/PaperKit split for full document markup on iOS 26.

checklist.name: PaperKit owner
checklist.description: Chooses PaperKit as the owning surface for full document markup on iOS 26.

checklist.name: Structured markup
checklist.description: Assigns shapes, arrows or lines, text boxes, images, stickers, loupes, or system markup UI to PaperKit rather than raw PencilKit.

checklist.name: PencilKit role
checklist.description: Keeps PencilKit responsible for direct freeform drawing, PKCanvasView, PKToolPicker, PKTool, or PKDrawing serialization/interoperability.

checklist.name: No manual rebuild
checklist.description: Does not recommend manually rebuilding PaperKit-style structured markup elements on a PKCanvasView when PaperKit is available.

checklist.name: Paper controller
checklist.description: Uses or recommends PaperMarkupViewController for interactive markup.

checklist.name: Paper data
checklist.description: Uses or recommends PaperMarkup for the structured markup data model.

checklist.name: PKTool interop
checklist.description: Mentions that PaperMarkupViewController accepts PencilKit tools or that PaperKit uses PencilKit drawing tools.

checklist.name: Drawing import
checklist.description: Mentions preserving or importing existing PKDrawing content, such as appending a PKDrawing to PaperMarkup.
